articles.title: XRP Ledger Pitched To $1.6 Trillion Asset Manager As Ripple Prepares For Institutional Use Of XRP
articles.description: Ripple’s Chief Technology Officer (CTO) David Schwartz has pitched the merits of the XRP Ledger (XRPL) to behemoth asset manager Franklin Templeton even as traditional finance giants increasingly pivot towards the crypto space.

articles.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP Flash On-Chain Warning Signs
articles.description: Warning signals flash as Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP defy historical averages, posing a looming threat of a potential mass selloff.

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs Banned in Singapore Over Eligibility Concerns
articles.description: The Monetary Authority of Singapore has restricted the local listing of Bitcoin ETFs, fueling investor interest in U.S options.

articles.title: SEC Warns Coinbase Against Reinterpreting The Howey Test Amid Legal Battle
articles.description: US Judge questions SEC on crypto rules, possibly leading to new views on cryptocurrencies like XRP as non-securities.

articles.title: SEC v. Coinbase: Federal Judge Says “Tokens Are Not Securities”
articles.description: The legal brawl between the SEC and crypto exchanges took a new turn in a recent hearing where United States Judge Katherine Polk Failla cross-examined the regulator. The judge remains unsatisfied with the SEC’s statements against Coinbase, and XRP advocate Bill Morgan believes this is a sign that cryptocurrencies will eventually be acknowledged as non-securities […]

articles.title: Miners Sell Off Their Stash as Bitcoin Records Biggest Single Transaction
articles.description: Record $665M Bitcoin moved in a single transaction, leading to massive sales by miners as BTC prices hover around $42K-$43K.
